name: Pfannkuchen or German Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 4 to 5 egg whites, beaten until very stiff
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine and whisk together the egg yolks, cornstarch, milk, water, salt, sugar, and lemon zest until smooth.
2. Gradually add the beaten egg whites to the yolk mixture, stirring gently until very stiff.
3. Melt the butter in a heavy 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
4. Pour the pancake batter into the hot skillet and cook for about 5 minutes on each side, or until it begins to set and lift from the surface of the pan.
5. Transfer the pancakes to a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until puffed and firm. Cooking time in all is approximately 7 minutes.
6. Serve immediately with confectioner's sugar and cinnamon, lemon juice, jam or jelly, or wine sauce.
